# Bada Edifica — Construcción y Reformas en Barcelona

## About
Bada Edifica is a construction and building company based in Badalona, Barcelona, Spain. Founded in 2023. One team covering all trades: electrical, plumbing, construction, renovations, fire safety, and cleaning.

## Contact
- Address: Carrer Alcalde Martínez Ecija 33, 08917 Badalona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain
- Phone: +34 935 593 581
- Email: info@badaedifica.com
- WhatsApp: +34 677 761 66

## Pages
- / (Home)
- /about (About Us)
- /services (Services)
- /projects (Projects)
- /contact (Contact)
- /career (Careers)

## Services
- Electrical installations and certifications
- Plumbing, water supply, and drainage
- Construction, structural work, and extensions
- Renovations and remodeling
- Post-construction cleaning and waste removal
- Fire safety detection and suppression systems

## Tech Stack
- Static HTML/CSS/JS website
- No framework — vanilla frontend
- Bilingual: Spanish (default) and English
- Oswald font family
